Message:
Hey bud, it is great to hear from you.  Congrats on the promotion... you
will do an awesome job!!!  I hope you get a chance to go to italy, it is
really beautiful and you will enjoy it immensely.  It took about 3 weeks to
go through the Panama Canal and get to Hawaii and we pulled into port for
about 4 1/2 days.  We had a great time, but I'm really looking forward to
Hawaii on the way back because we are going to be there for a week and
Cassandra is going to join me.  We are heading further west and will
participate in some maneuvers in a couple of days.  I can't tell you where
because our satellite might be monitered but Cassey knows.  I got an e-mail
from John Ohlenburg the other day... that was pretty random.  He is coming
back to Houston so maybe you will run into him.
